body:
## Type

bug

## Target

tau closure-publisher / project DAG workflow replay

## Target paths

- tau closure-publisher / project DAG workflow replay

## Current state

pdf_oxide GS001 restored the locked expected contract and recomputed goal_hash to sha256:ca56881acd36f5fdffffafc2a2ee73bbfd806df820f2fe0bd50ec52e794308ca. The pdf_oxide closure-state bundle is committed at 09dd3b183a5184ffa5e22b83704f1b871c35543a, but the available historical Tau closure receipts use older goal hashes and there is no committed Tau closure-publisher replay receipt for the current hash.

## Requested outcome

Tau can replay or publish the GS001 closure-publisher node against the current .tau/gs001-execution-dag.json goal hash, preserving goal-hash continuity and producing a terminal receipt that pdf_oxide Criterion 7/8 can consume without mutating SciLLM internals.

## Required proof

A non-mocked Tau replay/publish command writes a tau closure-publisher receipt with goal_hash sha256:ca56881acd36f5fdffffafc2a2ee73bbfd806df820f2fe0bd50ec52e794308ca, terminal_status accepted or pending_human, and references the committed pdf_oxide closure-state JSON/HTML/visual receipt. Also include a negative check that old goal hashes are rejected or marked stale.

## Route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Maintainer route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Requested repair agent

coder

## Non-goals

No unrelated refactors or scope expansion.

## Ticket type details

- **Observed failure:** pdf_oxide GS001 restored the locked expected contract and recomputed goal_hash to sha256:ca56881acd36f5fdffffafc2a2ee73bbfd806df820f2fe0bd50ec52e794308ca. The pdf_oxide closure-state bundle is committed at 09dd3b183a5184ffa5e22b83704f1b871c35543a, but the available historical Tau closure receipts use older goal hashes and there is no committed Tau closure-publisher replay receipt for the current hash.
- **Expected behavior:** Tau can replay or publish the GS001 closure-publisher node against the current .tau/gs001-execution-dag.json goal hash, preserving goal-hash continuity and producing a terminal receipt that pdf_oxide Criterion 7/8 can consume without mutating SciLLM internals.
- **Reproduction or artifact:** Clean checkout grahama1970/pdf_oxide branch codex/gs001-criterion6-ticket-closure-20260720 at 09dd3b183a5184ffa5e22b83704f1b871c35543a; inspect artifacts/pdf-lab/loop-runs/gs001-closure-publication-20260720T2335Z/gs001-closure-state.json and .tau/gs001-execution-dag.json.

<!-- ticket-skill
type: bug
target: tau closure-publisher / project DAG workflow replay
route: backend_python_or_skill_runtime
agent: coder
-->

This ticket must be resolved under `best-practices-github-ticket`. Closure requires deterministic proof; WebGPT review or CI green alone is not closure proof.

labels.name: route:backend_python_or_skill_runtime
labels.description: Maintainer route: backend Python or skill runtime

title: GS001 closure publisher must replay current goal hash
